ial_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414878494921870361","book_info":{"abstract":"（才开分，后面会涨的）
女尊 女帝 皇子
一朝兵败，叶酩栖从风光无限的皇子，变成了别国女帝的阶下囚，被迫成亲。
……
“逃？你或许逃得掉，你的国家逃得掉吗？”皇甫天衿捏住面前之人的下颌，嘴角勾起一丝恶劣的笑容。
“我从来没想过逃”叶酩栖低哑着声音说道。
他早就替自己想好了结局，那便是死。
皇甫天衿，给你准备的新婚礼物，希望你能喜欢……
等我变成一具尸体的时候，随便你怎么对待我。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/37ded3651727d9f924c9f5d514967a3d","author":"慕辞言","author_id":"","book_id":"7414878494921870361","book_name":"开局兵败，女帝掳我当皇夫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6022人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532706921640362521","read_count":"6022","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"399145"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"194","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,女强,古色古香","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2235e6a8fc27ca0b792591a182e1b4fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255136&x-signature=iulPa%2Fs3vfZGjp8o9lDOjZxCfss%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3870747854898031","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"256"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133216FF4A3ABE9CC6AB0A4FED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8450,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":45016,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1064},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"755
